summary.overall_judgment: All unique LLM no-candidate artifacts were valid rejections for the current rising-demand structural-pressure workflow.

artifact_reviews.title: Order Adopting Categorical Exclusions From Tennessee Valley Authority Under the National Environmental Policy Act; Notice of Adoption of Categorical Exclusions Under the National Environmental Policy Act
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Policy-enabling notice that may reduce future review friction, but the artifact itself does not evidence current or planned demand-led capital deployment or physical buildout.

artifact_reviews.title: Submission for Review: 3206-0138, Reinstatement of Disability Annuity Previously Terminated Because of Restoration To Earning Capacity, RI 30-9
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Paperwork and benefits administration notice with no plausible directional capital-flow implication.

artifact_reviews.title: Before Commissioners: Laura V. Swett, Chairman; David Rosner, Lindsay S. See, Judy W. Chang, and David LaCerte; North American Electric Reliability Corporation; Order Approving Inverter-Based Resources and Generators Modeling Reliability Standards
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Reliability-standards approval could matter later as system context, but the artifact alone does not signal current or planned directional capital movement.

artifact_reviews.title: Agency Information Collection Activity: VA-Guaranteed Home Loan Cash-Out Refinance Loan Comparison Disclosure
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Information-collection notice only. No demand-led buildout or directional capital deployment signal.

artifact_reviews.title: Self-Regulatory Organizations; Nasdaq PHLX LLC; Notice of Filing and Immediate Effectiveness of Proposed Rule Change To Amend Add Liquidity Orders
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Exchange market-structure rule change, not a capital-flow or physical buildout signal.

artifact_reviews.title: Agency Information Collection Activities; Comment Request; Report of Construction Contractor's Wage Rates
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Construction appears only inside a paperwork-renewal context. The artifact does not indicate new construction activity or rising-demand capital deployment.

artifact_reviews.title: Self-Regulatory Organizations; Texas Stock Exchange LLC; Notice of Filing and Immediate Effectiveness of a Proposed Rule Change To Add an Offset Peg Order
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Exchange order-type rule change with no plausible directional capital-flow implication for the current workflow.

artifact_reviews.title: Self-Regulatory Organizations; Nasdaq MRX, LLC; Notice of Filing and Immediate Effectiveness of Proposed Rule Change To Amend an Add Liquidity Order
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Exchange market-structure filing only. No physical-system stress or directional capital movement evidence.

artifact_reviews.title: Self-Regulatory Organizations; Nasdaq GEMX, LLC; Notice of Filing and Immediate Effectiveness of Proposed Rule Change To Amend Add Liquidity Orders
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Exchange market-structure filing only. No directional capital-flow implication for rising-demand structural-pressure discovery.

artifact_reviews.title: Amended and Restated Order Under Section 17(h)(4) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 Granting Exemption From Rule 17h-1T and Rule 17h-2T for Certain Broker-Dealers Maintaining Capital of Less Than $100 Million and Total Assets of Less Than $1 Billion
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Broker-dealer exemption order concerns regulatory thresholds, not directional capital deployment into a physical system.

artifact_reviews.title: Clean Air Act Operating Permit Program; Order on Petition for Objection to State Operating Permit for Platteville Natural Gas Processing Plant
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Permit-objection order for an existing facility. The artifact does not indicate new demand-led buildout or current capital movement.

artifact_reviews.title: Request for Comments on the Renewal of a Previously Approved Information Collection: Ocean Shipments Moving Under Export-Import Bank Financing
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Monitoring/reporting renewal tied to already-financed projects, not a fresh signal of directional capital flow in the artifact itself.

artifact_reviews.title: Prospective Grant of an Exclusive Patent License: Powered Gait Assistance Systems and Gait Assistance Systems and Methods of Control Thereof
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Exclusive licensing notice without concrete evidence of current or planned physical buildout. This remains out of scope for the current rising-demand workflow.

artifact_reviews.title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Information Collection Renewal; Submission for OMB Review; Appraisals for Higher-Priced Mortgage Loans
artifact_reviews.review_notes: OMB review and paperwork-renewal notice only. No directional capital-flow implication.

artifact_reviews.title: Self-Regulatory Organizations; Nasdaq ISE, LLC; Notice of Filing of Amendment No. 5 and Order Instituting Proceedings To Determine Whether To Approve or Disapprove a Proposed Rule Change, as Modified by Amendment No. 5, To Amend the Position and Exercise Limits for IBIT Options
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Exchange options market-structure rule matter, not evidence of directional capital deployment into a physical system.

artifact_reviews.title: Prospective Grant of an Exclusive Patent License: In Vivo Manufactured Anti-CD19 Chimeric Antigen Receptor (CAR) Products for the Treatment or Prevention of B Cell Mediated Autoimmune Diseases; Correction
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Correction to a licensing notice. No buildout or capital-flow evidence in the artifact.

artifact_reviews.title: Submission for OMB Review; Examination of Records by Comptroller General and Contract Audit
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Contract-audit paperwork review only. No evidence of directional capital movement or demand-led physical buildout.
